name: 12"x6"x4" Bin Organizer Clear - Brightroom™
description:
Add a simple organizational space for your bath, kitchen or other essentials with the Bin Organizer from Brightroom™. This clear organizer is designed with multiple compartments, providing ample room for cosmetics, toiletries, and other items you would like to keep within reach. Made of plastic, this bin organizer makes a functional addition to your home.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
